title: refactor: Extract ApiResponse type to the types directory
body:
The `ApiResponse` type is currently defined directly inside `app/page.tsx`. To improve code organization and make the type reusable across other files (such as API routes), it should be extracted into its own file within the `types` directory.

### Tasks
- [ ] Create a new file `types/api-response.ts`.
- [ ] Move the `ApiResponse` type definition from `app/page.tsx` into this new file and `export` it.
- [ ] Update `app/page.tsx` to import the `ApiResponse` type from the new file.
